title: Direct Talk
subTitle: Discusses with influential figures whose endeavours are making a global impact, and explores the dedication of skilled workers who try to solve challenges at local, regional, and international levels.

title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo
subTitle: Explores eggs that are safe for raw consumption by visiting farms and a restaurant in Kyoto with a diverse array of egg-based culinary delights.

title: NHK World Japan
subTitle: In the Edo period, childbirth was a community affair, with the mother-to-be attended by a midwife and the women in her life. It was also characterised by unique customs and superstitions.

title: Hometown Stories
subTitle: Intimate portraits of people from around Japan, each leading diverse lives while enriching lives of others, with themes ranging from ancient traditions to contemporary social issues.

title: Satoyama Kitchen Diary
subTitle: Grandpa Makoto and Grandma Nobuko venture up into the hills together, meticulously gathering butterbur sprouts needed to prepare a traditional batch of fuki-miso.

title: Japanology Plus
subTitle: Untangling Japan's long history with octopi, creatures that are not only eaten in Japan but also depicted in works of art. They may be regarded as objects of worship or even kept as pets.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Japan Railway Journal
subTitle: See how the railways maintain service in Japan's snow country. In regions that experience heavy snowfall, railways use snowploughs in combination with other systems to keep the trains running.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Core Kyoto
subTitle: Traditional Tsukemono, or pickles, preserve centuries of wisdom, allowing the vegetables' inherent flavors to shine. Picklers uphold tradition while embracing new challenges for modern tastes.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Today's Close-Up
subTitle: As the defendant claims his upbringing was impacted by his mother's donations to the former Unification Church, we hear how other children of followers with similar experiences feel about the trial.

title: Today's Close-Up
subTitle: As the defendant claims his upbringing was impacted by his mother's donations to the former Unification Church, we hear how other children of followers with similar experiences feel about the trial.

title: Design X Stories
subTitle: Today's theme: Bodies. As AI, digital and virtual spaces take over, thinking about physical bodies is more important than ever. Explore the role of designs which are rooted in human physicality.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Asia Insight
subTitle: A New Stage for Taiwanese Puppetry: In Taiwan, traditional puppet theater is enjoying a resurgence, capturing the hearts of young fans, and finding new audiences through video and social media.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Frontrunners
subTitle: Highlighting professionals at the forefront of different fields by showcasing their amazing work, discovering their motivations, and learning more about the challenges they may face in the future.

title: Sumopedia
subTitle: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Today's Close-Up
subTitle: Research links chewing to lifespan and focus. This vital connection makes declining oral strength a serious health concern, prompting experts to promote exercises and better eating habits.

title: Newsroom Tokyo
subTitle: Comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia. It explains the day's developments and what is behind them.

title: Direct Talk
subTitle: Renowned watchmaker Daizo Makihara discusses his works and passion for creating analogue watches in the digital world.

title: Direct Talk
subTitle: Renowned watchmaker Daizo Makihara discusses his works and passion for creating analogue watches in the digital world.

title: IMPACTS:Climates Change the World
subTitle: Experts use scientific data and the latest discoveries to analyse the impact of global warming and explore potential solutions.

title: NHK World Japan
subTitle: A group of anglers stand in a fast-moving, undulating river at the foot of a rugged cliff. They use drifting mosquito hooks to fish for a summer delicacy that was a favourite of the Edo townspeople.

title: Medical Frontiers
subTitle: Glaucoma, which can lead to blindness, often shows no symptoms in the early stages. We feature the latest efforts to restore the optic nerve, including new surgical techniques and gene therapy.

title: Gunma-chan
subTitle: A wide range of topics featuring Japanese culture and society are introduced.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Design X Stories
subTitle: Today's theme: Bodies. As AI, digital and virtual spaces take over, thinking about physical bodies is more important than ever. Explore the role of designs which are rooted in human physicality.

title: Today's Close-Up
subTitle: Research links chewing to lifespan and focus. This vital connection makes declining oral strength a serious health concern, prompting experts to promote exercises and better eating habits.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Chatroom Japan
subTitle: Xu Quanyi sees it as his mission to promote the charm of Fukushima. Sharing his stories is how he counters the stigma Fukushima continues to suffer following the 2011 disaster.

title: Japan's Top Inventions
subTitle: Japanese inventions are used and loved around the world. Through interviews and reenactments, go behind the scenes and discover how Japanese craftsmanship brought these top inventions into being.

title: Japanology Plus
subTitle: Peter Barakan offers insights into Japan through both his own experience with the country and by meeting experts across a variety of fields within Japanese art, culture and science.

title: Sumopedia
subTitle: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Wings Over Walls
subTitle: At top-ranked Univ. of Tokyo, where only 20% of students are female, many women have had their wings clipped. Through the university's history, we confront deep-rooted issues in Japanese society.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Navigating Disasters
subTitle: Japan has experienced major earthquakes and learned many lessons about how to prepare for them. We look at valuable advice on disaster prevention.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Train Cruise
subTitle: Criss-crossing Japan by rail. Enjoy the amazing diversity of nature and scenery throughout the country and across the four seasons. Exploring both well-known and hidden parts Japan.

title: Japanology Plus
subTitle: The spaces under Japan's elevated train tracks are now being used not just for pubs and restaurants but in many new ways, in various urban settings. Exploring the economic and community benefits.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Design X Stories
subTitle: Today's theme: Bodies. As AI, digital and virtual spaces take over, thinking about physical bodies is more important than ever. Explore the role of designs which are rooted in human physicality.

title: Design Ah! neo
subTitle: With modern music and images, the host introduces ideas and details of various designs related to the theme `Assemble'.

title: Mitateru-Phose: Let's Change Perspective!
subTitle: Using *mitateru*, a Japanese method, to stimulate children's imaginative thinking by prompting them to perceive objects in unconventional ways, fostering their individual viewpoints and inventiveness.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Magical Japanese
subTitle: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. A look at the unique world of the Japanese language, accompanied with scenes from Japan.

title: The Seasons of Yamato
subTitle: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, representing each season.

title: NHK World Japan
subTitle: A look at the rich and fascinating Edo era of Japan, which was dominated by a deep love for the arts. The traditional woodblock prints called Ukiyo-e blossomed during this period of time.

title: Grand Sumo Highlights
subTitle: Sumo highlights from a range of tournaments that have taken place across the globe. Sumo is one of the most traditional Japanese sports and boasts a history going back more than 1500 years.

title: Magical Japanese
subTitle: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. A look at different words related to water and exploring the unique culture behind these words.

title: MATSURI: The Heartbeat of Japan
subTitle: A look into the training and preparations for the Onabare festival, which include parading a portable shrine through the streets and performing along the way.

title: Tiny Desk Concerts Japan
subTitle: Set in the actual offices of NHK, renowned Japanese artists and international stars make their way to the tiny desk and breathe new life into music as they perform in a setting that is anything but ordinary.

title: BOSAI: Science That Can Save Your Life
subTitle: A look at Japan's efforts to improve tsunami evacuation, from overcoming normalcy bias that causes people to underestimate it's risks, to the installation of coastal evacuation towers.

subTitle: To make a dantsu carpet, everything from yarn-making to weaving is done by hand. Minagawa experiences the deep allure of handmade goods.

title: Running Across Recovering Sanriku
subTitle: A group of runners prepare for a stage race held on the coast of Iwate, covering 80 miles in three days. They learn about the area's recovery, thirteen years after the 2011 Great East Japan Earthquake and Tsunami.

subTitle: Charo and his companions go on a journey in the Tohoku region to search for the Eight-Starred Note that can stop the monster from reappearing.

subTitle: Presenting a variety of short conceptual scenarios focusing on the different ways of life in and around Japan.

title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
subTitle: Ricky was born in an apple orchard. It's a perfect playground for mischievous kittens! Pep spends the autumn in golden rice fields, hiding and hunting grasshoppers. Watch out for his pounce!

subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Anime Manga Explosion
subTitle: Discovers the secrets of Japanese anime and manga as their popularity continues to grow. Considers the appeal of these Japanese productions internationally, how they're created, and their cultural significance.

title: The New Adventures of Rockie and Her Friends
subTitle: Curly and his friends find a rare caterpillar during their outdoor time and decide to take care of it. However, Curly argues with them as the others become too carefree.

title: I Love 'Mee'
subTitle: Mee wets the bed even after making sure to go to the bathroom and not drink any water before bed. Through a Bedwetting Counselor, Mee learns that physical growth varies from person to person...

subTitle: A group of runners prepare for a stage race held on the coast of Iwate, covering 80 miles in three days. They learn about the area's recovery, thirteen years after the 2011 Great East Japan Earthquake and Tsunami.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Anime Manga Explosion
subTitle: Discovers the secrets of Japanese anime and manga as their popularity continues to grow. Considers the appeal of these Japanese productions internationally, how they're created, and their cultural significance.

title: The New Adventures of Rockie and Her Friends
subTitle: Curly and his friends find a rare caterpillar during their outdoor time and decide to take care of it. However, Curly argues with them as the others become too carefree.

title: I Love 'Mee'
subTitle: Mee wets the bed even after making sure to go to the bathroom and not drink any water before bed. Through a Bedwetting Counselor, Mee learns that physical growth varies from person to person...

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: J-MELO
subTitle: CROWN HEAD, a rock band creating a buzz after debuting this year, and Takagi Reni from Momoiro Clover Z stop by the studio to chat and perform.

title: Little Charo in Tohoku
subTitle: Charo and his companions go on a journey in the Tohoku region to search for the Eight-Starred Note that can stop the monster from reappearing.

title: Japanology Plus Mini
subTitle: Presenting a variety of short conceptual scenarios focusing on the different ways of life in and around Japan.

title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
subTitle: Ricky was born in an apple orchard. It's a perfect playground for mischievous kittens! Pep spends the autumn in golden rice fields, hiding and hunting grasshoppers. Watch out for his pounce!

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Somewhere Street
subTitle: A unique walking-eye view of the greatest cities around the globe. Featuring chats with locals and enjoying encounters that only strolling the city streets can bring.

title: Time-Lapse Japan
subTitle: Okinawa Prefecture is a group of subtropical islands in the far south of Japan. We examine its past and present, with footage from time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke. This time: Shuri Castle.

title: Grand Sumo Highlights
subTitle: Featuring all the top-division bouts from 14 September 2025, the first day of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Tokyo.

title: Sumopedia
subTitle: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: Hit the Road
subTitle: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a wide range of programs from news, current affairs, documentaries, etc. focusing on Japan and Asia.

title: Core Kyoto Mini
subTitle: A look at the timeless heart of Japan's ancient capital. Against its rich backdrop of culture and tradition, today's Kyoto continues to innovate and inspire, even after being established 1,200 years ago.

title: Easy Japanese for Work
subTitle: Irving-san, from Mexico, has trouble with keego. Soon, he will begin working at the clients' office two days a week. To improve his keego, Irving-san will tackle the role-play challenge.

title: Zero Waste Life
subTitle: With falling demand and fewer occasions to wear kimonos, Tajiri Daichi turns discarded kimono fabric into stylish shoes, bringing tradition into everyday life and helping to keep it alive.

title: NHK Newsline
subTitle: Hourly news updates featuring current affairs, business news, financial updates and global weather forecasts.

title: The Phone of the Wind: Whispers to Lost
subTitle: A phone booth in a private garden in northern Japan gives hope to people who lost loved ones in the 2011 earthquake and tsunami.
